title: This Is Bad... They Just Shut Down FABLE 5
summary: Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models were shut down by US government order after three days of availability. The video commentary raises questions about whether powerful frontier AI models will become restricted to government access only or remain available to the public.
writeup: The video reports that Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models were shut down by US government order after three days of public availability. It frames the central question around whether powerful frontier AI models will be restricted to government access or kept open to the public. The commentary connects this to broader themes of model regulation and role-based access control. The takeaway is a concern that frontier model availability may narrow following government intervention.
